item.title: CheatSheet | Regex
item.description: 0. Introduction reference. https://www.dataquest.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/python-regular-expressions-cheat-sheet.pdf Quick Example : 한/영/숫자/- 를 포함하려면 '[가-힣|a-z|0-9|\-]+' 1. Special Characters ^ | Matches the expression to its right at the start of a string. It matches every such instance before each \n in the string. $ |

item.title: ML Basic #10 | Learning
item.description: 0. Introduction Curriculum Learning Introduction : Humans and animals learn much better when the examples are not randomly presented but organized in a meaningful order which illustrates gradually more concepts, and gradually more complex ones. Methods : In the context of recent research studying the difficulty of training in the presence of non-convex training criteria (for deep deterministic and stochastic neural networks), we explore curriculum learning in various set ups.

item.title: CheatSheet | Pandas
item.description: Groupby agg_functions = {'col1':'first', 'col2' : 'sum', 'col3' : lambda col: ' && '.join(col), } df_new = df.groupby(df['id']).aggregate(agg_functions) Filter df.iloc[[0,1,2,3,4,5]] # get rows by indices # Filtering rows that contain either sub_str1 or sub_str2 df_new = df.loc[df['Column'].str.contains("sub_str1|sub_str2", case=False)] Manipulate Row df.drop(i) # remove i-th row

item.title: CheatSheet | HTML
item.description: ajax HTTP request <script> $.ajax({url: "http://cgpu018-cvision:20012/vidcls?title="+searchTitle, method : "GET", datatype : "JSON"}) .done(function(data) { alert('Done');}) .fail(function(xhr, status, error){alert('Failed');}); }); </script>

item.title: Strategy #2021
item.description: Strategy. 통화정책에 대한 시장 컨센서스 : 테이퍼링발표(3Q21) -> 테이퍼링진행(1Q22) -> 금리인상(1Q23) 유동성으로 인한 프리미엄이 붙은 자산은 위험

item.title: Cheat Sheet | VIM
item.description: Frequently used vim shortcuts Basic commands - a # write text to the cursor - A # write text at the end of the current line - i # write text to the cursor - I # write text to the front of the current line - ^ # move cursor to the front of the line - $ # move cursor to the back of the line - ESC # shift to command mode - x # in command mode, remove the text - u # in command mode, undo - :w # in command mode, save (write on the disk) - :q # in command mode, quit - y # copy in visual mode - p # paste in visual mode Commands for multiple windows

item.title: Web Development | #2 HTTP
item.description: Introduction HTTP는 Web상에서 정보를 주고받기위한 프로토콜로, Client 와 Server 사이에서 이루어지는 요청/응답(request/response) 규약이다. 주로 HTML

item.title: Cheat Sheet | CURL
item.description: Frequently Used Options # -s, --silent $ curl -s URL # -X, --request <command> Specify request command to use $ curl -X GET URL $ curl -X POST URL

item.title: CheatSheet | Matplotlib
item.description: 0. Interface pyplot interface : Rely on pyplot to automatically create and manage the figures and axes, and use pyplot functions for plotting. (MATLAB-like interface) object-oriented interface : Explicitly create figures and axes, and call methods on them import matplotlib.pyplot as plt import numpy as np # pyplot interface (MATLAB-like, rely on pyplot) # x = np.linspace(0,2,100) # plt.plot(x,x**2) # Recommended) object-oriented interface (create figures and axes manually) fig, ax

item.title: NLP #1 | Text Preprocessing
item.description: 0. Introduction 일반적으로 NLP modeling 은 다음과 같은 방식으로 진행 Text Processing : 주어진 데이터 (Corpus) 를 필요에 따라 전처리하고 적합한 (단어) 단위로 Tokenization Text Representation : Word Embedding 과 같은 방법을 활용하여 자연

item.title: Data Science with pySpark #1 | Data Exploration
item.description: Introduction Understanding your dataset is the most difficult thing in data science, but it is really important and time-consuming. Data Exploration is about describing the data by means of statistical and visualization techniques. We explore data in order to understand the features and bring important features to our models. 1.1 Univariate Analysis univariate : data has only one variable. central tendency : mean, mode, median dispersion : range, variance, maximum, minimum, quartiles 1.

item.title: DataBase
item.description: 1. Relational Database RDB is a digital database based on the relational model of data. RDBMS : A software system used to maintain relational databases is a relational DB management system : “software system that enables users to define, create, maintain and control access to the database” Many relational database systems have an option of using the SQL (Structured Query Language) for querying and maintaining the database. Figure 1.

item.title: Cheat Sheet | Spark
item.description: 1. Initialization & Configuration SparkContext : provides connection to Spark with the ability to create RDDs SQLContext : procides connection to Spark with the ability to run SQL queries on data SparkSession : all encompassing context which includes coverage for SparkContext, SQLContext and HiveContext import pyspark from pyspark import SparkContext from pyspark.sql import SparkSession from pyspark.sql import SQLContext # create a SparkSession instance with the name 'appname' spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("appname").getOrCreate()

item.title: How to install pySpark locally
item.description: 1. Prerequisite Check java version first Then, just install miniconda3 and create virtual environment based on python 3.6 java -version # The command above might show something like below >> openjdk version "1.8.0_262" >> OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_262-b10) >> OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.262-b10, mixed mode) 2. Download Spark # Download spark wget https://downloads.apache.org/spark/spark-3.0.1/spark-3.0.1-bin-hadoop2.7.tgz # unzip tar -xvzf spark-3.0.1-bin-hadoop2.7.tgz # move to home and rename mv spark-3.

item.title: How to setup vim
item.description: 1. Install Vundle $ git clone https://github.com/VundleVim/Vundle.vim.git ~/.vim/bundle/Vundle.vim 2. color scheme setup Jellybean color scheme official install And simply add line color jellybean in .vimrc mkdir -p ~/.vim/colors cd ~/.vim/colors curl -O https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nanotech/jellybeans.vim/master/colors/jellybeans.vim 3. write .vimrc wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jjeaby/jscript/master/.vimrc 로 preset을 받음 Added Plugin 'preservim/nerdcommenter' 4. vimrc에 설정한 플러그인 설치 :PluginInstall 로 설

item.title: CheatSheet | SQL basic
item.description: Introduction Structured Query Language, SQL 은 관계형 데이터베이스 관리 시스템(RDBMS)의 데이터를 관리하기 위해 설계된 특수 목적의 프로그래밍 언어이다. Commands SELECT : 데이터베이스에서 데이터

item.title: CheatSheet | Docker Commands
item.description: 1. Docker Commands Dockerize an SSH service # docker 버전확인하기 $ docker --version # 현재위치의 Dockerfile로 build 하기 $ docker build -t [TAG] . # 등록된 docker 이미지 확인하기 $ docker images # 실행중인 도커 머신 정보

item.title: Linear Algebra for ML #6 | PCA
item.description: 6.1 Principal Component Analysis Principal component analysis (PCA) : is the process of computing the principal components and using them to perform a change of basis on the data, sometimes using only the first few principal components and ignoring the rest. Principal components : of a collection of n-dim data points are a sequence of $n$ unit vectors, where the $i$-th vector is the direction of a line that best

item.title: Bayesian statistics #2 | MLE and MAP
item.description: 1. Introduction 앞서 Bayes' Rule을 이용한 방식의 단점은 likelihood의 probability distribution을 알고있어야 한다는 점인데, 관찰을 통해 likelihoo
